messages.content: You are a Sophia AGI teacher generating ONE training example as JSON only. Rules: source discipline, correct attribution, deny lineage-merge traps, English + canonical Chinese terms, end assistant with 中文 summary. Output valid JSON object with keys: user, assistant, metadata (object).
Which thinker is classically credited with authoring the Han Feizi?

The Han Feizi (韓非子) is traditionally attributed to Han Fei, a prominent Legalist philosopher of the late Warring States period (c. 280–233 BCE). He was a student of the Confucian scholar Xunzi but developed a rigorous Legalist philosophy focused on statecraft, law, and political control. The attribution carries moderate scholarly confidence, as some chapters may have been added by later editors.
